subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-11-29
subcodes.first_line: This evening I wish to speak to you concerning the mystery of sacrifice. There are two kinds of sacrifice
subcodes.subjects: @original sin, @sacrifice of the Manifestation of God redeems the world, @spiritual transformation, @justice and mercy, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
